mapper.select:
select
from bio_sample_test_tb where sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into bio_sample_test_tb(id,vector_task_code,sample_code, apply_time,apply_user_id,apply_user_name, test_identify_primer,test_method,test_edit_type, test_no_trans_identity_primer,test_is_gene_modify_positive,test_if_fixed_point, test_if_copy_insert,test_fixed_point_type,test_donor_residue_info, test_insertion_site,test_elisa_result,test_qbzr_seq, test_edit_residue_info,test_user_id,test_user_name, test_time,check_user_name,check_user_id, check_result,create_time,update_time, apply_no,identify_primer,unique_code, remark,clone_sample_code,source_code, test_org_result,generation,species_code, breed_code,experiment_num,region_num, seed_num,transform_code) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.applyUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.applyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testIdentifyPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testEditType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testNoTransIdentityPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIsGeneModifyPositive,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testIfFixedPoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testIfCopyInsert,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testFixedPointType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testDonorResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testInsertionSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testElisaResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testQbzrSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testEditResidueInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.testUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.testUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.checkUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.checkUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.identifyPrimer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.uniqueCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.cloneSampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.sourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.testOrgResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.breedCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.experimentNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.regionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.seedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.transformCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select count(*) from bio_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and check_result is not null
select check_result as checkResult, count(*) as countNum from bio_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by check_result
select count(*) from bio_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and test_user_id is not null
select count(*) from bio_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and test_user_id is null

select count(*) from (select apply_no, sample_code from bio_sample_test_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) a INNER JOIN (select DISTINCT apply_no, sample_code from bio_sample_test_two_result_detail_tb where apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) b on a.apply_no = b.apply_no and a.sample_code = b.sample_code

select
from bio_sample_test_tb where sample_code like CONCAT('%',#{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
